title: Force from Expanding Juice in a Bottle
body: A farmer making grape juice fills a glass bottle to the brim and caps it tightly. The juice expands more than the glass when it warms up, in such a way that the volume increases by $$0.20\%$$. The bottle does not break, and the bulk modulus of the juice is $$1.8\times{10}^9$$ $$\frac{N}{m^2}$$.
